records.ety: [AS. nafela, fr. nafu nave; akin to D. navel, G. nabel, OHG. nabolo, Icel. nafli, Dan. navle, Sw. nafle, L. umbilicus, Gr. 'omfalo`s, Skr. nābhīla. √260. See Nave hub, and cf. Omphalic, Nombril, Umbilical.]

defs: A mark or depression in the middle of the abdomen; the umbilicus; called also belly button in humans. See Umbilicus.
The central part or point of anything; the middle.
quotes: Within the navel of this hideous wood, Immured in cypress shades, a sorcerer dwells.

defs: An eye on the under side of a carronade for securing it to a carriage.
